steps.name: Create Opportunity in Newport News Pipeline
Set Opportunity Location Field to Newport News
Tag Contact as Newport News Lead

detail.body: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, thanks for reaching out to Men's Wellness Centers - Newport News. Book your consult here: {{custom_values.newport_news__booking_link}}. Reply STOP to opt out.

steps.name: Notify Team of New Newport News Lead

detail.body: Hey {{contact.first_name}}, ready to get booked? Grab a time here: {{custom_values.newport_news__booking_link}}. Reply STOP to opt out.
{{contact.first_name}}, still want to come in? Times at our Newport News center fill up fast — pick yours here: {{custom_values.newport_news__booking_link}}
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, just checking in — it takes about 30 seconds to lock in your consult: {{custom_values.newport_news__booking_link}}
{{contact.first_name}}, we'd still love to see you at Men's Wellness Centers Newport News. Here's your link whenever you're ready: {{custom_values.newport_news__booking_link}}
Last note from us, {{contact.first_name}} — if you're still interested, your spot's right here: {{custom_values.newport_news__booking_link}}. Reply STOP to opt out.

detail.body:
Welcome to Men's Wellness Centers, {{contact.first_name}} your membership is officially active

Questions anytime: just reply here or call (757) 806-6263. 

We're glad you're with us.
Reply STOP to opt out.

detail.subject: Your first visit at Men's Wellness Centers, what to know
detail.body_text:
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, Welcome again, here's everything you need for a smooth first visit.

WHERE Men's Wellness Centers, Newport News.
Free parking is available on-site. WHEN YOU ARRIVE Come in about 10 minutes early.

Check in at the front desk the team will already have you on the schedule.

WHAT TO BRING
- A photo ID
- Your current medication list, if any
- Any questions you've been holding onto visits are unhurried on purpose WHO YOU'LL MEET Your Patient Care Consultant will walk you through your membership and your schedule going forward, and the clinical team takes it from there.

Need to adjust anything before then?
Reply to this email or call us at (757) 806-6263.

See you soon,
The Men's Wellness Centers Team, Newport News

workflows.name: 5.4a–e — Newport News - A&D Nurture - All Objections

triggers.name: Objection: Cost Tag Added (Newport News Only)

detail.body:
Hello {{contact.name}},

…most members use a payment plan, several options make the monthly number very manageable. Want me to send them over?

Reply STOP to end msgs.

Thank you,
{{user.name}}

steps.name: Wait 2 days before next message (9am–7pm delivery restriction)

detail.subject: Payment Options to Suit Your Budget
detail.body_text:
Hello {{contact.name}},

We understand that cost can be a concern when considering our services. Many of our members choose from a variety of payment plans designed to make the monthly cost manageable and fit within their budget.

If you'd like, I can send you details on these options to help you make the best decision for your needs.

Feel free to reach out with any questions or if you'd like to discuss further.

Best regards,
{{user.name}}

detail.body: Send SMS using [LOC-BOOKING] rebook link/message to encourage Newport News contacts to rebook. Use exact user message content for SMS.

Hi {{contact.name}},

Just a quick note to let you know the door's open whenever timing and budget line up. Whenever you're ready, reach out and we'll help you get started again!

Best regards,
{{user.name}}

{{contact.first_name}}, 

totally normal to want to think it over.

 Most members tell us the first visit was the hardest part everything after is straightforward and on your schedule. 

Happy to answer anything by text. 

Reply STOP to opt out.

steps.name: Wait 2 days before next message (9am–7pm delivery restriction)

detail.subject: What membership actually looks like, week to week
detail.body_text:
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, A lot of guys go in expecting complicated it's really not.

Most members describe it as: a quick visit on the schedule, a few minutes at the front desk, and a conversation with your Patient Care Consultant about how things are going. That's it. There's no big commitment moment after the first visit it's just part of the routine, like anything else you've built a habit around.

Any specific question on your mind?
Reply here a real person answers.

detail.body: {{contact.first_name}}, makes sense to talk it over at home first. If it would help, your partner is welcome to join a quick call or your next visit most spouses have the same three questions. Reply STOP to opt out.

steps.name: Wait 2 days before next message (9am–7pm delivery restriction)

detail.subject: Payment Options to Suit Your Budget
detail.body_text:
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, Totally reasonable to want your partner looped in before deciding anything. We're glad to have them join either a quick call, or your next visit in person.

The questions partners usually ask: what the time commitment looks like, how the cost breaks down, and what actually changes day to day. All fair, all easy to answer together.

Just reply here with a time that works for both of you, or have them call us directly at (757) 806-6263.

detail.body: {{contact.first_name}}, take the time you need. One thing worth knowing: your consult results stay on file, so picking this up later is a 10-minute conversation, not a restart. Reply STOP to opt out.

steps.name: Wait 2 days before next message (9am–7pm delivery restriction)

detail.subject: A few questions members ask before deciding
detail.body_text:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

No rush at all. While you're thinking it over, here are answers to the

things members usually want to know before committing:

- Your consult notes stay on file nothing gets lost if you wait

- There's no expiration on picking this back up

- Most members say the decision got easier once they slept on it, not harder

If something specific is on your mind, just reply we'd rather answer the real question than guess at it.

detail.body: {{contact.first_name}}, understood — life's schedule wins sometimes. When things open up, rebooking takes about a minute and your consult carries over. Reply STOP to opt out.

steps.name: Wait 2 days before next message (9am–7pm delivery restriction)

detail.subject: We work around your schedule, not the other way around
detail.body_text: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, If timing was the issue, good news visits are quick (about an hour), and we keep extended hours on Mondays and Fridays specifically for schedules like yours. Whenever your calendar clears, rebooking takes under a minute and nothing about your consult needs to be redone.

Reply here a real person answers.

detail.body: {{contact.first_name}}, makes sense to talk it over at home first. If it would help, your partner is welcome to join a quick call or your next visit most spouses have the same three questions. Reply STOP to opt out.

steps.name: Wait 2 days before next message (9am–7pm delivery restriction)

detail.subject: Payment Options to Suit Your Budget
detail.body_text:
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, Totally reasonable to want your partner looped in before deciding anything. We're glad to have them join either a quick call, or your next visit in person.

The questions partners usually ask: what the time commitment looks like, how the cost breaks down, and what actually changes day to day. All fair, all easy to answer together.

Just reply here with a time that works for both of you, or have them call us directly at (757) 806-6263.

detail.body: {{contact.first_name}}, take the time you need. One thing worth knowing: your consult results stay on file, so picking this up later is a 10-minute conversation, not a restart. Reply STOP to opt out.

steps.name: Wait 2 days before next message (9am–7pm delivery restriction)

detail.subject: A few questions members ask before deciding
detail.body_text:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

No rush at all. While you're thinking it over, here are answers to the

things members usually want to know before committing:

- Your consult notes stay on file nothing gets lost if you wait

- There's no expiration on picking this back up

- Most members say the decision got easier once they slept on it, not harder

If something specific is on your mind, just reply we'd rather answer the real question than guess at it.

detail.body: {{contact.first_name}}, understood — life's schedule wins sometimes. When things open up, rebooking takes about a minute and your consult carries over. Reply STOP to opt out.

steps.name: Wait 2 days before next message (9am–7pm delivery restriction)

detail.subject: We work around your schedule, not the other way around
detail.body_text: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, If timing was the issue, good news visits are quick (about an hour), and we keep extended hours on Mondays and Fridays specifically for schedules like yours. Whenever your calendar clears, rebooking takes under a minute and nothing about your consult needs to be redone.

detail.subject: Small habits, big difference — {{contact.first_name}}
detail.body_text:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

It's been about a month since we saw you at Men's Wellness Centers, and

we wanted to check in — no agenda, just a few things worth passing along.

Most men tell us the changes that made the biggest difference weren't

dramatic. They were small and repeatable:

- Getting to bed and waking up at consistent times, even on weekends

- Ten minutes of morning light before the phone comes out

- Protein earlier in the day instead of loading it all at dinner

- A short daily walk — not a workout, just movement

None of this is a substitute for what we talked about in your consult —

it's just the groundwork that makes everything else work better.

And whenever you're ready to pick up where we left off, your consult

notes are still on file. Restarting is a short conversation, not a

do-over.

Take care of yourself,

The Men's Wellness Centers Team – Newport News

(757) 806-6263

detail.body: {{contact.first_name}}, checking in from Men's Wellness Centers — no pitch, just wondering how you've been feeling lately. If anything's changed, we're an easy text away.

detail.subject: The season most men let it slide — {{contact.first_name}}
detail.body_text:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

There's a stretch every year shorter days, colder mornings, the

schedule gets heavier where energy and motivation tend to dip for a

lot of men.

It's common enough that it's almost predictable.

If you've noticed it in yourself lately, you're not imagining it, and

you're not alone in it. It's also the time of year where the men who

stay consistent sleep, movement, the basics notice the biggest gap

between how they feel and how everyone around them feels.

We're still here, and your consult is still on file. If the timing feels

better now than it did a few months ago, picking it back up takes about

ten minutes.

No pressure either way just didn't want the season to pass without

checking in.

The Men's Wellness Centers Team – Newport News

(757) 806-6263

detail.body: {{contact.first_name}}, last note from us for a while your file with Men's Wellness Centers stays active, and the door's open whenever the timing's right. Reply anytime, a real person answers.

We look forward to welcoming you back!

Best,
The Men's Wellness Centers Team
